data.name: 自由行動俠-在辦公室任意侵犯女同事吧
data.detailed_description:
遊戲簡介:

拘束？催眠？壁尻？時間停止？變成透明人？！甚至連法律都能改變？！
在這片自由無拘的場域中，讓你的超自然力量發揮到極限！

辦公室、會議室、走廊，無論在哪裡，都能盡情探索，體驗前所未有的自由互動！

遊戲玩法:

玩家可以用滑鼠或鍵盤操作角色在場景中自由移動，使用超自然力量，使用停止時間、放置陷阱、全員高潮等技能。

技能是透過每次通過關卡所獲得的積分兌換的，隨著遊戲進度往下，還可以增加各項數值、開啟特殊關卡、甚至是修改法律！？

遊戲特色:

🔹 超自然技能 – 停止時間、放置陷阱、操控意識，全都隨你支配！

🔹 角色養成 – 透過積分提升能力，解鎖更多互動方式與玩法！

🔹 修改法律 – 打破常規，改變世界規則，讓一切符合你的幻想！

🔹 多樣角色 – 15 種不同風格的角色，各具個性與專屬劇情！

🔹 獎勵模式 – 解鎖隱藏內容，挑戰特殊任務，讓樂趣更加倍！
打造你最終極的幻想體驗，盡情探索這個無限制的世界吧！

data.short_description: 拘束？催眠？壁尻？時間停止？變成透明人？甚至連法律都能改變？！ 體驗前所未有的自由互動、在辦公室裡為所欲為吧！！ 會議室、走廊，無論在哪碰到誰，都能隨時進入H，體驗前所未有的自由互動！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Freestyle Man in Office
data.detailed_description:
Story Synopsis:

Freeze time? Bondage? Hypnosis? Stuck in walls? Invisible man?! Even the law could be changed?!
In this free and unfettered space, push your supernatural powers to the limit!

In the offices, in the meeting rooms, in the corridors, you could explore wherever you liked and interact freely like never before!
The most freestyle action hentai game is born here!

How to Play:

Players can use the mouse to control the protagonist to move freely in the scenes and to use supernatural powers, using skills such as freeze time, place traps, and everyone climax.
Skills are gained through earning points, but you can also increase your points ​​or even modify laws?!

Game Features:

🔹 Supernatural skills--Freeze time, place traps, mental manipulation, all at your disposal!

🔹 Character development--​​Improve your abilities through earning points to unlock more ways to interact and have sex!

🔹 Change the laws--Break the rules, change the rules of the world, and make everything fit your fantasy!

🔹 Various characters--15 characters in different styles, each with their own personality and exclusive story!

🔹 Reward mode--Unlock hidden contents, challenge special missions, and double the fun!
Create your ultimate fantasy experience and explore this unlimited world to your heart’s content!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
